title: adhatoda repens
intro: Adhatoda repens, also known as Adhatoda vasica, is a plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The plant has medicinal properties due to the presence of alkaloids, particularly vasicine and vasicinone, which have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Adhatoda repens include relief from coughs and colds, bronchitis, and asthma, and it can also be used to treat digestive issues and skin conditions; herbal preparations include teas, infusions, and capsules.
